data: * Estimate does not meet NCHS standards of reliability / **While the estimate meets NCHS standards of reliability, its complement does not / -Quantity zero

Based on a survey question that asked respondents, "Would you say [subject name's] health in general was excellent, very good, good, fair, or poor?" "Fair" and "poor" are combined in this table. This information was obtained during a part of the interview that allowed proxy responses, such that a knowledgeable adult family member could respond on behalf of adults not taking part in the interview.
